name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Sysmon Driver Unload
notes:
This Building Block detect possible Sysmon driver unload.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Kirill Kiryanov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Sysmon Driver Unload
SIGMA Description: Detect possible Sysmon driver unload


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Sysmon Driver Unload on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of fltmc.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%unload%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sysmon%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Sysmon Driver Unload on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of fltmc.exe
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%unload%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sysmon%') AQL filter query
